overview: I rebuilt my Feature Spec Generator as a six-agent Streamlit system using Claude Haiku and Sonnet. It replaced my manual 3-tab clipboard workflow and now produces specs scoring 90+ out of 100 in 10-15 minutes at ~$0.20 each — hitting 4-5 docs/hour vs. my old 2-3/week.

keyPoints.title: Session state replaced me as the integration layer
Two-tier improvement threshold pushed all 3 specs to 92-94
Parse-once dictionary pattern eliminated positional corruption
Improver regression: LLMs regenerate, not edit — lesson learned
$0.15-0.25 per spec; ~$100/year vs. 10-20 hrs/week PM time
